Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a textual description of a hiring process We need to create two POWL models one with potential unfairness due to an XOR branch for community affiliation and one without

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Resume Parsing and Initial Data Check This is an automated scan Missing information triggers a loop where the applicant is asked to provide additional details We can model this as a loop

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can model this as a loop between two activities DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Preliminary Skill Assessment After the data is complete applicants take a skill test We can represent this as SkillAssessment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In the unfair model There is an XOR branch after the skill assessment One branch is the standard cultural fit check and the other is a community affiliation check that gives a subtle advantage In the fair model All applicants undergo the same cultural fit check so no XOR branch

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Managerial Review and Final Decision After the cultural fit step whichever branch is taken there is a managerial review and then a final decision We can represent these as ManagerialReview and FinalDecision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: A human reviewer hiring manager examines borderline candidates However in the process flow it seems that every candidate that passes the previous steps goes through managerial review

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: To simplify we can model the process as DataCompletenessCheck if missing we do RequestMoreInfo and then check again

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets define the activities ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For the unfair model we have a loop after ReceiveApplication Then after the loop we do SkillAssessment Then we have an XOR either CulturalFitCheck or CommunityAffiliationCheck Then we do ManagerialReview and then FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We want ReceiveApplication loop SkillAssessment xor ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For the fair model we remove the XOR and just have CulturalFitCheck after the skill assessment
